arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Hammarby winger attracting interest from Premier League?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are reportedly among a wide array of clubs who are interested in signing Hammarby winger Bazoumana Toure.

arts.ttl: 'I have never seen him': Jamie Carragher surprised by where Liverpool star was playing v West Ham
arts.sum: Liverpool cruised to a comfortable 5-1 win over West Ham United in the League Cup on Wednesday night at Anfield. As expected, Arne Slot made...

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon 'told team-mates he was signing for Liverpool' during Euro 2024 as Newcastle scrambled to meet PSR regulations - with saga 'contributing to his lack of action' in Germany
arts.sum: The Newcastle forward (left), who has been in talks over a new deal with the club, came close to joining the Reds from his current team as the Magpies scrambled to meet PSR regulations.
